---
title: "Jaylah Moering"
subtitle: "Actuarial Mathematics Student"

# Replace with your actual image file name
image: mypic.jpg

about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/JaylahMoering
---

A little bit about my life:

\
I grew up in Mission Viejo, California and lived there my whole life. I have three beautiful pets, and I'm on track to graduate with my bachelors degree from Cal State Fullerton in spring 2026!

## Education

Associate of Science in Mathematics\

[Saddleback College]{.underline}
